title: lithocardium cordifolium
intro: Lithocardium cordifolium, also known as Digitalis purpurea, is a flowering plant in the foxglove family (Plantaginaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include cardiotonic and diuretic effects, making it useful in treating conditions such as heart failure and atrial fibrillation. The health benefits of lithocardium cordifolium include improved heart function, reduced risk of heart failure, and relief from symptoms of atrial fibrillation. Lithocardium cordifolium is often prepared into herbal preparations such as tinctures, capsules, and extracts, and should be used under the guidance of a healthcare professional due to its potential toxicity.
